jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Toppr
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Toppr in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
